mapper.select: SELECT password FROM student WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM student WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, student_no, full_name, username, password, dept_id, created_at, updated_at FROM student WHERE student_no = #{studentNo}
SELECT id, student_no, full_name, username, password, dept_id, created_at, updated_at FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET username = #{username}, password = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
